Chembla Ellent [ Magician Spells ]  

Merchant
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded July 10th, 2017 by Gidono

  • This mob spawns at -1047, -244, +83 in the Erudin library, 3rd floor.
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): Yes

Available on progression servers pre kunark.

Categories: Templatized | EverQuest
This page last modified 2017-07-10 14:59:45.

Level: 50
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-01-31 11:29:57

Goods sold (20):
Spell: Dagger of Symbols 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Dimensional Hole 6pp 2gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Dimensional Pocket 6gp 2sp 9cp
Spell: Modulating Rod 10pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Spear of Warding 3pp 1gp 4sp 9cp
Spell: Staff of Runes 4pp 1gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Staff of Symbols 6pp 2gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Staff of Tracing 1pp 4sp 9cp
Spell: Staff of Warding 2pp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Summon Arrows 3pp 1gp 4sp 9cp
Spell: Summon Bandages 1gp 6sp 7cp
Spell: Summon Coldstone 5pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Spell: Summon Dagger 4sp 1cp
Spell: Summon Fang 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp
Spell: Summon Heatstone 3pp 1gp 4sp 9cp
Spell: Summon Ring of Flight 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Summon Throwing Dagger 3pp 1gp 4sp 9cp
Spell: Summon Waterstone 3pp 1gp 4sp 9cp
Spell: Summon Wisp 2gp 9cp
Spell: Sword of Runes 5pp 2gp 4sp 9cp

Known Habitats:
  Erudin

Report a correction

# Jan 11 2011 at 6:02 PM Rating: Excellent
Byren
Guru
2,467 posts
No new items, adding prices:

[Tue Jan 11 16:01:17 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 8 platinum 3 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Dagger of Symbols.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:18 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 6 platinum 2 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Dimensional Hole.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:19 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 6 gold 2 silver 9 copper per Spell: Dimensional Pocket.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:20 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 10 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Modulating Rod.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:20 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 3 platinum 1 gold 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Spear of Warding.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:21 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 4 platinum 1 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Staff of Runes.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:22 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 6 platinum 2 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Staff of Symbols.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:22 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 1 platinum 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Staff of Tracing.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:23 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 2 platinum 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Staff of Warding.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:24 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 3 platinum 1 gold 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Summon Arrows.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:25 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 1 gold 6 silver 7 copper per Spell: Summon Bandages.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:26 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 5 platinum 2 gold 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Summon Coldstone.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:28 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 4 silver 1 copper per Spell: Summon Dagger.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:29 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 1 platinum 3 gold 6 silver 4 copper per Spell: Summon Fang.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:30 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 3 platinum 1 gold 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Summon Heatstone.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:31 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 8 platinum 3 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Summon Ring of Flight.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:32 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 3 platinum 1 gold 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Summon Throwing Dagger.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:33 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 3 platinum 1 gold 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Summon Waterstone.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:34 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 2 gold 9 copper per Spell: Summon Wisp.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:01:34 2011] Chembla Ellent tells you, 'That'll be 5 platinum 2 gold 4 silver 9 copper per Spell: Sword of Runes.'

Erudin.....not Erudin Palace
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2006 at 9:42 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1607905031065
Scholar
403 posts
She is not in the same zone as the rest of the spell merchants. You have to zone out to Erudin proper and go into the library.

# Nov 21 2005 at 10:11 AM Rating: Default

i saw on casters realm that there is a spell for lvl one called unpack brewers still (or something like that). I have not been able to find anything about it on here. Does anybody know where i can find it?

# Jul 16 2005 at 4:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592275944422
95 posts
YES, Confirmed I see her on Track. And I bought Spell: Modulated Rods (or whatever) from her for oh so ever little plat :)


EDIT: Spell: Modulating Rod -- 20pp 7g 8s 9c
Thats with 202 Charisma as a Druid
She is Up near the Wizard spells in ERUDIN.
Infact she is on /find

Chembla Ellent is located in the Erudin Library on upper floor (exact /loc n1047.64, n241.10, p83.72)
